comment:
$$2\sin x\cos x+\sqrt{3}\cos x=0\\ \cos x(2\sin x+\sqrt{3})=0\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \cos x=0\\ \sin x=-\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=\frac{\pi }{2} +\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=-\frac{\pi }{3} +2\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=-\frac{2\pi }{3} +2\pi n,n\in Z \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x=\frac{\pi }{2} +\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=-\frac{\pi }{3} +2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=-\frac{2\pi }{3} +2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\).
